summary: Iteration 88 features fully tested. Backend: 19/19 tests passed - Products API returns launch_score/launch_score_label/launch_score_reasoning, Suppliers API returns all required fields (supplier_name, supplier_cost, shipping_origin, supplier_rating), Admin Image stats returns counts, TikTok Intelligence returns full data structure. Frontend: Product Analysis nav correctly routes to /discover, Discover page shows products with AI-generated images and launch scores, Product detail page shows 7-Signal Launch Score breakdown with competition penalty, Supplier Listings section shows 3 suppliers with cost/rating/delivery/origin, TikTok Intelligence page loads with data (1.1B views, 30 products, avg score 33). One minor issue: TikTok Intel page product links use slugs that return 404 (e.g., /trending/cloud-pillow-slides) but Discover page links work correctly using product IDs.

integration_issues.issue: Product links on TikTok Intelligence page use slugs (e.g., /trending/cloud-pillow-slides) that return 404. Products may not have slugs set in database.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 88 verified: (1) Product Analysis nav routes to /discover. (2) Launch scores recalibrated with 7-signal breakdown including competition penalty. (3) Supplier data embedded in products and displayed in Supplier Listings section. (4) Admin image endpoints work but require PEXELS_API_KEY for actual refresh. (5) TikTok Intelligence page shows real data. (6) Minor: TikTok page product links use slugs that return 404 - products may need slug field populated.
